triples.subject: Federal government
triples.sentence: The federal government charges roughly 18 cents in taxes for every gallon of gasoline you purchase.

triples.subject: Average gasoline-powered car
triples.sentence: Your average gasoline-powered car is less than 30 percent efficient.

triples.sentence: General Motors is investing $27 billion to launch EVs.
